sections.executive_summary: This is a sample executive summary section that would be generated by the LLM based on deterministic features and semantic classifications. The actual content would include key metrics like Marketing Efficiency Ratio (MER) of 5.0, LTV:CAC ratio of 3.0, and overall health score of 85/100.
sections.financial_performance: Sample financial performance analysis including revenue growth of 20%, CAC payback period of 2 months, and marketing spend utilization of 95%.
sections.funnel_analysis: Sample funnel analysis covering top-of-funnel metrics, conversion rates, and bottleneck identification.
sections.channel_performance: Sample channel analysis covering SEO, paid advertising, email marketing, and social media performance.
sections.swot_analysis: Sample SWOT synthesis identifying key strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats.
sections.recommendations: Sample recommendations for the next 30 days, 1-6 months, and 6-12 months.

details.message: LTV:CAC ratio 3.0 validated in generated text
MER value 5.0 validated in generated text
Revenue growth 20% validated in generated text
